---
id: get-guardrails-version-guardrails-versions-version-get
title: "Get a specific guardrails version"
description: "Return the guardrails version for the given version string (e.g. 'v1', 'v2')."
sidebar_label: "Get a specific guardrails version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-backend-api

<Heading
  as=&#123;"h1"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi__heading"&#125;
  children=&#123;"Get a specific guardrails version"&#125;
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"get"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/guardrails/versions/&#123;version&#125;"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return the guardrails version for the given version string (e.g. "v1", "v2").

HTTP 404 — version not found.

  id=&#123;"request"&#125;
  as=&#123;"h2"&#125;
